---
title: "JobAgeProject"
author: "Obydah Jazaeri"
date: "2026-02-21"
output: html_document
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library(janitor)    
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
data2017 <- read_excel("cpsaat11b.xlsx")
data2018 <- read_excel("data2018.xlsx")
data2019 <- read_excel("data2019.xlsx")
```

```{r cleaning 2017/18/19 }
data2017 <- data2017 |> 
  slice(-(1:3))
data2017 <- data2017 |> 
  slice(-2)
data2017 <- data2017 |> 
  slice(-3)
data2017 <- data2017 |>
  row_to_names(row_number = 1)

data2018 <- data2018 |> 
  slice(-(1:3))
data2018 <- data2018 |> 
  slice(-2)
data2018 <- data2018 |> 
  slice(-3)
data2018 <- data2018 |>
  row_to_names(row_number = 1)

data2019 <- data2019 |> 
  slice(-(1:3))
data2019 <- data2019 |> 
  slice(-2)
data2019 <- data2019 |> 
  slice(-3)
data2019 <- data2019 |>
  row_to_names(row_number = 1)



```
